sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41245" key="e)pi/tama" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίτᾰμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen><sense id="n41245.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"><cit TEIform="cit"><quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">, (ἐπιτείνὠ</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extension,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.457c</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
